---
title: "memory_db.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\memory_db.py"
loc: 107
complexity: 12
logic_score: 5.60
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 4.39
overall_score: 2.65
---

## Intent
The `memory_db.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on MemoryDB, __init__, upsert_skill, search_intent, get_total_skills. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via MemoryDB, __init__, upsert_skill, search_intent, get_total_skills. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [chromadb](file://chromadb)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `MemoryDB`
- `__init__`
- `upsert_skill`
- `search_intent`
- `get_total_skills`
